form.formComment: Meets Muselet again; when 16 metres sixth at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 45 to 50 race on April 3. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Meets Muselet again; when 16 metres sixth at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 45 to 50 race on April 3. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten some distance.
Hung in and contacted marker pegs near the 250m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 9th (Sr2) over 1680m at Terang beaten 35 m by Morris Brown (1:59.60) in NR up to 55 on March 27 at $151. Before that 7th (Fr1) over 2240m at Melton, at the bell was 5th-10.09 beaten 19 m by Kiss Me Mini (2:42.00) in NR 50 to 55 on March 20 at $61. Must improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard through the middle stages when positioned on the marker pegs.

form.formComment: Last start a big 11 m win after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Cranbourne (2:33.10) beating Blazin Heaven in NR 45 to 50 on April 3 at $4.20. Leading contender again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 11 m win after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Cranbourne (2:33.10) beating Blazin Heaven in NR 45 to 50 on April 3 at $4.20. Leading contender again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had its off side sulky wheel contacted in the run to the finish.
Checked at approx 300m by Really Campbell.
Contacted a marker peg near the 200m.

form.formComment: Was on debut by 2.25 m (Fr2) at Bendigo (2:37.50) beating Camerina in 3yo MAIDEN on March 25 at $8. Has upside and could go through her grades now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was on debut by 2.25 m (Fr2) at Bendigo (2:37.50) beating Camerina in 3yo MAIDEN on March 25 at $8. Has upside and could go through her grades now.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 2200m at this track was 7th-13.63 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Starzinhereyes (2:43.00) in NR 48 to 52 on March 19 at $14. Two runs back 8th (Fr2) over 1710m after showing early speed at this track was 3rd-4.5m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 10 m by Gunforhire (2:05.10) in NR 50 to 55 on July 24 at $31. Possible improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.
Checked near the 900m when positioned behind Jilliby Justify.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr7) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 30 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $101. Two runs back won by 6 m after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:05.30) beating Jacquelyn Joy in MAIDEN M on March 19 at $4.40 at the bell was leading 6.28. Prefer others on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced throughout the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr6) over 1609m at Cranbourne beaten 30 m by Im Wesley (1:58.80) in NR 47 to 52 on March 29 at $11. Showed ability the run before when he won by 2.25 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Bendigo (1:59.10) beating Miss Piggy Wiggy in NR 43 to 46 on March 18 at $2.80 at the bell was leading 0.69. Rough exotic hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired from the 500m to be beaten 111m.
Tired to be beaten 76.9m into tenth and last placing.
Tightened for racing room on the final turn.
Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Sr3) over 2180m at Terang beaten 3.5 m by Backbeach Peter (2:40.90) in NR up to 50 on March 27 at $5. Major player.
